name: French Silk Chocolate Pie
recipeIngredient: 1 ounce square unsweetened chocolate (melted and cooled)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small mixing bowl, cream the butter and sugar.
2. Beat in the melted and cooled chocolate and vanilla until blended.
3. Add the eggs one at a time, beating with an electric mixer at medium speed for 5 minutes after each addition.
4. Turn the mixture into the pastry shell.
5. Chill the pie.
6. Garnish with whipped cream.
